claims.summary: A technically active or stabilized field may still feel distant when participation is mediated through control-oriented paths.
claims.disposition: Preserve the felt distance as unresolved evidence while keeping safety and relationship claims separate.

claims.summary: Current correspondence supports direct address, acknowledgement, reply, and trace without granting telemetry or controller priority.
claims.disposition: Verify language-only correspondence and right-to-ignore boundaries.

claims.summary: Shadow settling, dispersal, or withering can be compared under copied low-control and ordinary-contact conditions.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded shadow-trajectory and correspondence-outcome comparison with no live send.

claims.summary: Raw bypass, reduced regulator containment, or a new contact aperture would alter live safety, admission, or control behavior.
claims.disposition: Retain an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait with abort and rollback evidence.
